idea-plugin.name: Copy Path for Agent
idea-plugin.description:
Copy Path for Agent

Copy file and folder references from JetBrains IDEs in configurable agent-friendly formats. Use the built-in claudecode and codex presets, or define your own template.

  • Editor selections include line numbers based on the selected text.
  • Multiple carets generate one reference per caret.
  • Project tree multi-selection copies all selected files and folders.
  • Directory slashes are controlled by template variables such as {directorySlash}.
  • Multiple references can be separated by a space or newline.
  • Templates can use variables such as {relativePath}, {absolutePath}, {directorySlash}, {claudeReference}, and {codexTarget}.

Presets

PresetOutput
claudecode@src/utils/auth.ts#L42-68
codex[auth.ts:42-68](/absolute/path/src/utils/auth.ts:42)

How to Use

  • Editor context menu - Right-click in any editor and choose Copy Path for Agent.
  • Project tree context menu - Right-click any file or folder in the Project tool window and choose Copy Path for Agent.
  • Keyboard shortcut - Press Alt+C (Option+C on macOS).

Settings

Settings - Tools - Copy Path for Agent

  • Preset - Choose claudecode or codex to fill the template.
  • Template - Customize the copied reference with documented variables.
  • Multiple references separator - Space or newline.
  • Notification - Toggle copy notifications and set their duration.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Forked from Copy Path for Claude Code and renamed to Copy Path for Agent.
  • Added configurable templates with documented variables.
  • Added claudecode and codex presets.
  • Removed hidden path suffix toggles; add {space} or {directorySlash} to the template if needed.
  • Kept editor selection, multi-caret, multi-file, folder, separator, shortcut, and notification features.

action.description: Copy file path references with configurable agent templates
